calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-30-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Linda Chan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Worldwide Asset Purchasing, II, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Kok T. Eng, a/k/a Kok Eng, a/k/a T. Eng Kok.
Default was entered against defendant on December 5, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 8, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Worldwide Asset Purchasing, II, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Kok T. Eng, a/k/a Kok Eng, a/k/a T. Eng Kok as follows:

Damages/Principal - $44,041.14.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,881.21.
Costs - $395.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $52,317.35.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
